title: .spec-drive-state.json
description: State file that tracks spec-drive execution progress. Committed to git, collocated with spec artifacts.

basePath.description: Absolute path to the spec directory (e.g., ~/spec-drive-projects/my-project/spec)

phase.description: Current phase in the spec-driven development lifecycle

mode.description: Execution mode. normal = approval gates between phases. auto = full autonomous cycle.

taskIndex.description: 0-based index of the current task in tasks.md

totalTasks.description: Total number of tasks in tasks.md

taskIteration.description: Retry count for the current task. Resets to 1 when advancing to next task.

maxTaskIterations.description: Maximum retries per task before stopping

globalIteration.description: Total loop iterations across all tasks

maxGlobalIterations.description: Safety cap on total loop iterations to prevent infinite token burn

awaitingApproval.description: Whether the current phase is waiting for user approval before proceeding

parallelGroup.description: Tracks parallel [P] task batch execution state

startIndex.description: First task index in the parallel batch

endIndex.description: Last task index in the parallel batch

taskIndices.description: All task indices in this parallel batch

isParallel.description: Whether this batch is currently executing in parallel

taskResults.description: Results keyed by task index. Tracks status and errors for completed/failed tasks.
